(** * Quotient Rings *)

(** In this file we define the quotient of a ring by an ideal. *)
Instance plus_quotient_group : Plus (QuotientAbGroup R I) := group_sgop.

goals.conclusion:
forall x x' y y' : R,
in_cosetL I x x' -> in_cosetL I y y' -> in_cosetL I (sg_op x y) (sg_op x' y')

contents: intros x x' y y' p q.

goals.conclusion: in_cosetL I (sg_op x y) (sg_op x' y')

forall a a' b : R,
in_cosetL
  {|
    normalsubgroup_subgroup := I;
    normalsubgroup_isnormal := isnormal_ab_subgroup R I
  |} a a' ->
?dclass a b = ?dclass a' b

forall a b b' : R,
in_cosetL
  {|
    normalsubgroup_subgroup := I;
    normalsubgroup_isnormal := isnormal_ab_subgroup R I
  |} b b' ->
?dclass a b = ?dclass a b'

in_cosetL
  {|
    normalsubgroup_subgroup := I;
    normalsubgroup_isnormal := isnormal_ab_subgroup R I
  |} a a' ->
(fun x y : R =>
 class_of
   (in_cosetL
      {|
        normalsubgroup_subgroup := I;
        normalsubgroup_isnormal := isnormal_ab_subgroup R I
      |})
   (x * y))
  a b =
(fun x y : R =>
 class_of
   (in_cosetL
      {|
        normalsubgroup_subgroup := I;
        normalsubgroup_isnormal := isnormal_ab_subgroup R I
      |})
   (x * y))
  a' b

(fun x0 y0 : R =>
 class_of
   (in_cosetL
      {|
        normalsubgroup_subgroup := I;
        normalsubgroup_isnormal := isnormal_ab_subgroup R I
      |})
   (x0 * y0))
  x y =
(fun x0 y0 : R =>
 class_of
   (in_cosetL
      {|
        normalsubgroup_subgroup := I;
        normalsubgroup_isnormal := isnormal_ab_subgroup R I
      |})
   (x0 * y0))
  x' y

contents: Instance one_quotient_abgroup : One (QuotientAbGroup R I) := class_of _ one.
(** Associativity follows from the underlying operation *)
srapply Quotient_ind3_hprop; intros x y z.

goals.conclusion:
(fun
   x0 y0
    z0 : Quotient
           (in_cosetL
              {|
                normalsubgroup_subgroup := I;
                normalsubgroup_isnormal := isnormal_ab_subgroup R I
              |}) =>
 sg_op x0 (sg_op y0 z0) = sg_op (sg_op x0 y0) z0)
  (class_of
     (in_cosetL
        {|
          normalsubgroup_subgroup := I;
          normalsubgroup_isnormal := isnormal_ab_subgroup R I
        |})
     x)
  (class_of
     (in_cosetL
        {|
          normalsubgroup_subgroup := I;
          normalsubgroup_isnormal := isnormal_ab_subgroup R I
        |})
     y)
  (class_of
     (in_cosetL
        {|
          normalsubgroup_subgroup := I;
          normalsubgroup_isnormal := isnormal_ab_subgroup R I
        |})
     z)

class_of (fun x0 y0 : R => I (sg_op (inv x0) y0)) (x * (y * z)) =
class_of (fun x0 y0 : R => I (sg_op (inv x0) y0)) (x * y * z)

contents: (* Left and right identity follow from the underlying structure *)

goals.conclusion:
(fun
   x0 : Quotient
          (in_cosetL
             {|
               normalsubgroup_subgroup := I;
               normalsubgroup_isnormal := isnormal_ab_subgroup R I
             |}) =>
 sg_op mon_unit x0 = x0)
  (class_of
     (in_cosetL
        {|
          normalsubgroup_subgroup := I;
          normalsubgroup_isnormal := isnormal_ab_subgroup R I
        |})
     x)

(fun
   x0 : Quotient
          (in_cosetL
             {|
               normalsubgroup_subgroup := I;
               normalsubgroup_isnormal := isnormal_ab_subgroup R I
             |}) =>
 sg_op x0 mon_unit = x0)
  (class_of
     (in_cosetL
        {|
          normalsubgroup_subgroup := I;
          normalsubgroup_isnormal := isnormal_ab_subgroup R I
        |})
     x)

class_of (fun x0 y : R => I (sg_op (inv x0) y)) (1 * x) =
class_of (fun x0 y : R => I (sg_op (inv x0) y)) x

class_of (fun x0 y : R => I (sg_op (inv x0) y)) (x * 1) =
class_of (fun x0 y : R => I (sg_op (inv x0) y)) x

contents: srapply Quotient_ind3_hprop; intros x y z.

goals.conclusion:
(fun
   x0 y0
    z0 : Quotient
           (in_cosetL
              {|
                normalsubgroup_subgroup := I;
                normalsubgroup_isnormal := isnormal_ab_subgroup R I
              |}) =>
 x0 * (y0 + z0) = x0 * y0 + x0 * z0)
  (class_of
     (in_cosetL
        {|
          normalsubgroup_subgroup := I;
          normalsubgroup_isnormal := isnormal_ab_subgroup R I
        |})
     x)
  (class_of

        |})

unfold sg_op, mult_is_sg_op, mult_quotient_group,
        plus, mult, plus_quotient_group; simpl.

goals.conclusion:
class_of (fun x0 y0 : R => I (sg_op (inv x0) y0)) (ring_mult x (sg_op y z)) =
class_of (fun x0 y0 : R => I (sg_op (inv x0) y0))
  (sg_op (ring_mult x y) (ring_mult x z))
ring_mult x (sg_op y z) = sg_op (ring_mult x y) (ring_mult x z)

contents: srapply Quotient_ind3_hprop; intros x y z.

goals.conclusion:
(fun
   x0 y0
    z0 : Quotient
           (in_cosetL
              {|
                normalsubgroup_subgroup := I;
                normalsubgroup_isnormal := isnormal_ab_subgroup R I
              |}) =>
 (x0 + y0) * z0 = x0 * z0 + y0 * z0)
  (class_of
     (in_cosetL
        {|
          normalsubgroup_subgroup := I;
          normalsubgroup_isnormal := isnormal_ab_subgroup R I
        |})
     x)
  (class_of
     (in_cosetL
        {|
          normalsubgroup_subgroup := I;
          normalsubgroup_isnormal := isnormal_ab_subgroup R I
        |})
     y)
  (class_of
     (in_cosetL
        {|
          normalsubgroup_subgroup := I;
          normalsubgroup_isnormal := isnormal_ab_subgroup R I
        |})
     z)

contents:
unfold sg_op, mult_is_sg_op, mult_quotient_group,
        plus, mult, plus_quotient_group; simpl.

goals.conclusion:
class_of (fun x0 y0 : R => I (sg_op (inv x0) y0)) (ring_mult (sg_op x y) z) =
class_of (fun x0 y0 : R => I (sg_op (inv x0) y0))
  (sg_op (ring_mult x z) (ring_mult y z))
ring_mult (sg_op x y) z = sg_op (ring_mult x z) (ring_mult y z)

contents:
Definition QuotientRing : Ring
    := Build_Ring (QuotientAbGroup R I) _ _ _ _ _ _ _.

Definition rng_quotient_map {R : Ring} (I : Ideal R)
  : RingHomomorphism R (R / I).

Instance issurj_rng_quotient_map {R : Ring} (I : Ideal R)
  : IsSurjection (rng_quotient_map I).

(** *** Specialized induction principles *)

(** We provide some specialized induction principles for [QuotientRing] that require cleaner hypotheses than the ones given by [Quotient_ind]. *)

Definition QuotientRing_ind {R : Ring} {I : Ideal R} (P : R / I -> Type)
  `{forall x, IsHSet (P x)}
  (c : forall (x : R), P (rng_quotient_map I x))
  (g : forall (x y : R) (h : I (- x + y)), qglue h # c x = c y)
  : forall (r : R / I), P r
  := Quotient_ind _ P c g.
(** And a version eliminating into hprops. This one is especially useful. *)

Definition QuotientRing_ind_hprop {R : Ring} {I : Ideal R} (P : R / I -> Type)
  `{forall x, IsHProp (P x)} (c : forall (x : R), P (rng_quotient_map I x))
  : forall (r : R / I), P r
  := Quotient_ind_hprop _ P c.

Definition QuotientRing_ind2_hprop {R : Ring} {I : Ideal R} (P : R / I -> R / I -> Type)
  `{forall x y, IsHProp (P x y)}
  (c : forall (x y : R), P (rng_quotient_map I x) (rng_quotient_map I y))
  : forall (r s : R / I), P r s
  := Quotient_ind2_hprop _ P c.

Definition QuotientRing_rec {R : Ring} {I : Ideal R} (S : Ring)
  (f : R $-> S) (H : forall x, I x -> f x = 0) 
  : R / I $-> S.

hypotheses.type: forall x : R, I x -> f x = 0
forall x : R, I x -> f x = 0
forall x : R, I x -> f x = 0
forall x : R, I x -> f x = 0
forall x : R, I x -> f x = 0

goals.conclusion:
forall n : R,
{|
  normalsubgroup_subgroup := I;
  normalsubgroup_isnormal := isnormal_ab_subgroup R I
|} n -> f n = mon_unit

hypotheses.type: forall x : R, I x -> f x = 0

goals.conclusion:
IsMonoidPreserving
  (grp_quotient_rec R
     {|
       normalsubgroup_subgroup := I;
       normalsubgroup_isnormal := isnormal_ab_subgroup R I
     |} f H)

hypotheses.type: forall x : R, I x -> f x = 0

goals.conclusion:
IsSemiGroupPreserving
  (grp_quotient_rec R
     {|
       normalsubgroup_subgroup := I;
       normalsubgroup_isnormal := isnormal_ab_subgroup R I
     |} f H)

hypotheses.type: forall x : R, I x -> f x = 0

goals.conclusion:
IsUnitPreserving
  (grp_quotient_rec R
     {|
       normalsubgroup_subgroup := I;
       normalsubgroup_isnormal := isnormal_ab_subgroup R I
     |} f H)

hypotheses.type: forall x : R, I x -> f x = 0

goals.conclusion:
IsSemiGroupPreserving
  (grp_quotient_rec R
     {|
       normalsubgroup_subgroup := I;
       normalsubgroup_isnormal := isnormal_ab_subgroup R I
     |} f H)

hypotheses.type: forall x : R, I x -> f x = 0

goals.conclusion:
forall x y : R,
(fun r s : R / I =>
 grp_quotient_rec R
   {|
     normalsubgroup_subgroup := I;
     normalsubgroup_isnormal := isnormal_ab_subgroup R I
   |} f H (sg_op r s) =
 sg_op
   (grp_quotient_rec R
      {|
        normalsubgroup_subgroup := I;
        normalsubgroup_isnormal := isnormal_ab_subgroup R I
      |} f H r)
   (grp_quotient_rec R
      {|
        normalsubgroup_subgroup := I;
        normalsubgroup_isnormal := isnormal_ab_subgroup R I
      |} f H s))
  (rng_quotient_map I x) (rng_quotient_map I y)

hypotheses.type: forall x : R, I x -> f x = 0

goals.conclusion:
IsUnitPreserving
  (grp_quotient_rec R
     {|
       normalsubgroup_subgroup := I;
       normalsubgroup_isnormal := isnormal_ab_subgroup R I
     |} f H)

hypotheses.type: forall x : R, I x -> f x = 0

contents:
(** ** Quotient theory *)

(** First isomorphism theorem for commutative rings *)

Definition rng_first_iso `{Funext} {A B : Ring} (f : A $-> B)
  : A / ideal_kernel f ≅ rng_image f.

goals.conclusion:
(fun r s : A / ideal_kernel f =>
 abgroup_first_iso f (sg_op r s) =
 sg_op (abgroup_first_iso f r) (abgroup_first_iso f s))
  (rng_quotient_map (ideal_kernel f) x) (rng_quotient_map (ideal_kernel f) y)

(abgroup_first_iso f
   (sg_op (rng_quotient_map (ideal_kernel f) x)
      (rng_quotient_map (ideal_kernel f) y))).1 =
(sg_op (abgroup_first_iso f (rng_quotient_map (ideal_kernel f) x))
   (abgroup_first_iso f (rng_quotient_map (ideal_kernel f) y))).1

contents:
Lemma rng_quotient_invar {R : Ring} {I J : Ideal R} (p : (I ↔ J)%ideal)
  : R / I ≅ R / J.

goals.conclusion:
forall a b : R,
in_cosetL
  {|
    normalsubgroup_subgroup := I;
    normalsubgroup_isnormal := isnormal_ab_subgroup R I
  |} a b <->
in_cosetL
  {|
    normalsubgroup_subgroup := J;
    normalsubgroup_isnormal := isnormal_ab_subgroup R J
  |} (?f a) (?f b)

forall a b : R,
in_cosetL
  {|
    normalsubgroup_subgroup := I;
    normalsubgroup_isnormal := isnormal_ab_subgroup R I
  |} a b <->
in_cosetL
  {|
    normalsubgroup_subgroup := J;
    normalsubgroup_isnormal := isnormal_ab_subgroup R J
  |} (1%equiv a) (1%equiv b)
I (sg_op (inv x) y) <-> J (sg_op (inv x) y)

IsSemiRingPreserving
  (equiv_quotient_functor'
     (in_cosetL
        {|
          normalsubgroup_subgroup := I;
          normalsubgroup_isnormal := isnormal_ab_subgroup R I
        |})
     (in_cosetL
        {|
          normalsubgroup_subgroup := J;
          normalsubgroup_isnormal := isnormal_ab_subgroup R J
        |})
     1
     (fun x y : R =>
      p (sg_op (inv x) y)
      :
      in_cosetL
        {|
          normalsubgroup_subgroup := I;
          normalsubgroup_isnormal := isnormal_ab_subgroup R I
        |} x y <->
      in_cosetL
        {|
          normalsubgroup_subgroup := J;
          normalsubgroup_isnormal := isnormal_ab_subgroup R J
        |} (1%equiv x) (1%equiv y)))

IsSemiGroupPreserving
  (equiv_quotient_functor'
     (in_cosetL
        {|
          normalsubgroup_subgroup := I;
          normalsubgroup_isnormal := isnormal_ab_subgroup R I
        |})
     (in_cosetL
        {|
          normalsubgroup_subgroup := J;
          normalsubgroup_isnormal := isnormal_ab_subgroup R J
        |})
     1 (fun x y : R => p (sg_op (inv x) y)))

IsSemiGroupPreserving
  (equiv_quotient_functor'
     (in_cosetL
        {|
          normalsubgroup_subgroup := I;
          normalsubgroup_isnormal := isnormal_ab_subgroup R I
        |})
     (in_cosetL
        {|
          normalsubgroup_subgroup := J;
          normalsubgroup_isnormal := isnormal_ab_subgroup R J
        |})
     1 (fun x y : R => p (sg_op (inv x) y)))

contents: 1,2: srapply Quotient_ind2_hprop; intros x y; rapply qglue.

goals.conclusion:
in_cosetL
  {|
    normalsubgroup_subgroup := J;
    normalsubgroup_isnormal := isnormal_ab_subgroup R J
  |} (1%equiv (sg_op x y)) (sg_op (1%equiv x) (1%equiv y))

in_cosetL
  {|
    normalsubgroup_subgroup := J;
    normalsubgroup_isnormal := isnormal_ab_subgroup R J
  |} (1%equiv (x * y)) (1%equiv x * 1%equiv y)

in_cosetL
  {|
    normalsubgroup_subgroup := J;
    normalsubgroup_isnormal := isnormal_ab_subgroup R J
  |} (1%equiv (x * y)) (1%equiv x * 1%equiv y)

contents: (** We phrase the first ring isomorphism theorem in a slightly different way so that it is easier to use. This form specifically asks for a surjective map *)

Definition rng_first_iso' `{Funext} {A B : Ring} (f : A $-> B)
  (issurj_f : IsSurjection f)
  (I : Ideal A) (p : (I ↔ ideal_kernel f)%ideal)
  : A / I ≅ B.
